name: xau_atr_breakout_momentum_m5_v1
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, when current bar's range exceeds 1.8x ATR(14) AND closes in the top/bottom 25% of its range AND ADX>22, the next bar continues in the breakout direction for at least 1.5R. ATR-percentile gate ensures the breakout is not just noise in low-vol.

entry.long: (high-low) > 1.8*ATR(14) AND close >= low + 0.75*(high-low) AND close > ema(50)
entry.short: (high-low) > 1.8*ATR(14) AND close <= low + 0.25*(high-low) AND close < ema(50)

notes: Diversity vs candidate 1 (mean-rev on same symbol/different TF). No session filter to avoid prior-gen zero-trade bug. Verify XAUUSD alias.
